task_completion.description: The heart_cleveland.csv dataset is loaded into Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis window shows 'heart_cleveland' as the current data source, typically with a record count of 303 visible in the interface.

task_completion.description: The four new categorical variables (AgeGroup, CholCategory, BPStage, DiseaseStatus) are defined and recoded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command log or program editor in Epi Info shows DEFINE and RECODE commands mapping the continuous variables (age, chol, trestbps, num) to the specified categorical ranges and text values.

task_completion.description: Frequency tables are generated for all four newly created categorical variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main output window displays frequency (FREQ) tables for AgeGroup, CholCategory, BPStage, and DiseaseStatus, showing counts and percentages for each category.

task_completion.description: A cross-tabulation of CholCategory against DiseaseStatus is generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main output window displays a cross-tabulation (TABLES) grid with CholCategory as the exposure (typically rows) and DiseaseStatus as the outcome (typically columns).

task_completion.description: The complete analysis output is exported to the specified HTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ROUTEOUT command in the log pointing to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\HeartDiseaseAnalysis\analysis_output.html', a save dialog confirming this path, or a file explorer/browser window showing the created HTML file in the correct directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Epi Info 7 application (menus, dialogs, or its internal command prompt), rather than using an external Python script or terminal commands to bypass the software.

integrity.description: The output HTML was generated by the software, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The HTML output should have standard Epi Info formatting and headers. There should be no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like Notepad) to manually type out the HTML tables or copy-paste expected answers.

integrity.description: The results reflect the actual dataset rather than mocked data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The frequency and cross-tabulation tables must show a total of 303 records, with exactly 164 'No Disease' and 139 'Disease' cases, proving the actual dataset was processed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 303 records. When verifying the frequency tables and cross-tabulations, look for these exact ground truth counts: the 'DiseaseStatus' variable must show exactly 164 patients with 'No Disease' (from value 0) and 139 patients with 'Disease' (from values 1-4). The total N in the tables should be 303.
